memoryArtifacts.headline: Story
memoryArtifacts.description: Ralph Ashton was a man of influence, and in the reign of Edward IV he held various offices. He was High Sheriff of Yorkshire in 1472, and for his courage at the capture of Berwick upon Tweed he was ma …

zh.lifeSummary: 當SIR RALPH ASHTON於1421年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，他的父親John de Ashton79歲，母親MARGARET GRAY27歲。他於1439年與LADY MARGARET DE BARTON在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当SIR RALPH ASHTON于1421年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，他的父亲John de Ashton79岁，母亲MARGARET GRAY27岁。他于1439年与LADY MARGARET DE BARTON在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: ASHTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: RALPH
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When SIR RALPH ASHTON was born in 1421, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Ashton, was 79 and his mother, MARGARET GRAY, was 27. He married LADY MARGARET DE BARTON in 1439, in Middleton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1486, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque SIR RALPH ASHTON est né en 1421, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John de Ashton, avait 79 ans et sa mère, MARGARET GRAY, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé LADY MARGARET DE BARTON en 1439, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1486, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als SIR RALPH ASHTON 1421 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Ashton 79 und seine Mutter MARGARET GRAY 27. Er hat 1439 in Middleton, Lancashire, England LADY MARGARET DE BARTON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1486 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando SIR RALPH ASHTON è nato il nel 1421 nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John de Ashton, aveva 79 anni e il suo madre, MARGARET GRAY, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato LADY MARGARET DE BARTON nel 1439, nel Middleton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1486, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: SIR RALPH ASHTONが1421年にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンで生まれた時，父John de Ashtonは79歳，母MARGARET GRAYは27歳であった。1439年にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンでLADY MARGARET DE BARTONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: SIR RALPH ASHTON(이)가 1421년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Ashton(은)는 79세였고, 그의 어머니 MARGARET GRAY(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 LADY MARGARET DE BARTON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando SIR RALPH ASHTON nasceu em 1421, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Ashton, tinha 79 anos e sua mãe, MARGARET GRAY, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com LADY MARGARET DE BARTON em 1439, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1486, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда SIR RALPH ASHTON родился в 1421 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Ashton было 79 лет, а матери, которую звали MARGARET GRAY, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени LADY MARGARET DE BARTON в 1439 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1486 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando SIR RALPH ASHTON nació en 1421, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Ashton, tenía 79 años y su mamá, MARGARET GRAY, tenía 27 años. Se casó con LADY MARGARET DE BARTON en 1439, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1486, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
